title: Boundary Starter Pack Checklist
description: Assess your current boundaries and identify areas for improvement. Check off the boundaries you already have in place, then work on the unchecked ones.
instructions: Honestly review each boundary statement. Check the ones you consistently maintain. The unchecked items represent opportunities for growth. Revisit this checklist as you practice the skills from this course.

items.label: I can say 'no' without excessive guilt or over-explaining
I take responsibility for my own feelings, not others'
I make decisions based on my values, not just to please others
I allow myself alone time when I need it without guilt
I express my needs and preferences clearly and respectfully
I use 'I' statements when expressing how I feel
I can listen to others' problems without feeling I must fix them
I can disagree with someone without anxiety or aggression
I set limits on social engagements when I need downtime
I maintain distance from people who consistently drain or disrespect me
I manage my social media usage and unfollow accounts that trigger anxiety
I maintain clear boundaries between work time and personal time
I speak up when my workload becomes unmanageable
I don't feel obligated to be available 24/7 to anyone

disclaimer: This checklist is for educational purposes only. If you are experiencing abuse or unsafe situations, please contact the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (call or text 988) or the National Domestic Violence Hotline (1-800-799-7233).
